_publications._publicationTitle: Longitudinal evaluation of quality of life in 288 patients with neurofibromatosis 2.

_contextSnippet: The internal reliability of NFTI-QOL was found to be very good, with a Cronbach's alpha score of 0.85 and re-test reliability r = 0.84.
details: Internal reliability was very good with Cronbach's alpha score of 0.85 and re-test reliability r = 0.84
